title: Canonical assumptions
scope: 20x20逻辑仓位、sim/PLC/FIO边界、已重判结论

title: Warehouse simulation core
scope: 可行性、运动学、SCORE、SEQ、NEAR、AWRA入口

title: Strategy library
scope: CB、TOB、AUTO路由、阈值和原因码

title: Tier 3 realism runner
scope: 初始布局、动态阶段、失败语义和固定策略链

title: Cargo scenario registry
scope: E01-E18货物情景

title: Cargo scenario validation
scope: 场景完整性、入口拒收、hash登记

title: S1 18x8 manifest
scope: 18情景x8模式x10 seeds，sim only

title: S1 aggregate matrix
scope: 逐情景逐算法可行性和P95聚合

title: S3 trace generator
scope: 3 Tier x 3 profile x 5模式代表回放

title: S3 trace manifest
scope: 45条single-seed代表回放与source hashes

title: Factory I/O I/O map
scope: Entry/Load/Unload/Exit、叉臂与Lift交接

title: F3 collision and 20x20 boundary decision
scope: 54格物理I/O验证、400格物理No-Go

title: Factory I/O Automated Warehouse
scope: 官方场景目标：运输、存储、取回箱子

title: Factory I/O Emitter
scope: 物品生成、生成体积占用和发射参数

title: Factory I/O Remover
scope: 物品与移除体积相交后移除

title: Factory I/O Heavy Load Parts
scope: 重载设备低速、辊筒输送速度上限

title: Factory I/O Light Load Parts
scope: 轻载输送速度上限

title: Factory I/O Creating a Scene
scope: 部件放置、相交红框、Edit到Run销毁规则

title: Factory I/O User Interface
scope: 时间倍率、Orbit/Fly/Follow/Cameras和性能警告

title: ISA-101 Series of Standards
scope: HMI设计、可用性与性能标准体系

title: ISA101 Committee
scope: 菜单层级、导航、图形、颜色、动态元素和报警

title: ABB Operator workplace and process graphics best practice
scope: 以人为本、统一过程图形和工作场所设计

title: W3C WCAG Use of Color
scope: 颜色不能是唯一信息载体

title: W3C WCAG Content on Hover or Focus
scope: 悬浮/焦点补充内容可消除、可悬停、可持续

title: W3C WCAG Name Role Value
scope: 自定义控件需暴露名称、角色、状态和值
